title: Game Functions — Modular Code
description: Refactor the game into functions for cleaner, modular code. Create at least 4 functions: displayRoom() to show the current room description, playerAttack() to calculate and return attack damage, showInventory() to list the player's items, and saveGame() to write stats to a file. Each function should have a proper return type, parameters, and a function body with braces. Call these functions from main(). Assign your C++ code to the variable `cpp`.
test_code:
import re
func_pattern = re.findall(r'(?:void|int|string|bool|double|float)\s+\w+\s*\([^)]*\)\s*\{', cpp)
assert len(func_pattern) >= 4, f'Define at least 4 functions with return types, names, parameters, and bodies (found {len(func_pattern)})'
assert 'displayRoom' in cpp or 'display_room' in cpp or 'showRoom' in cpp, 'Create a function to display room info (e.g., displayRoom)'
assert 'playerAttack' in cpp or 'player_attack' in cpp or 'attack' in cpp.lower(), 'Create a function for player attacks (e.g., playerAttack)'
assert 'showInventory' in cpp or 'show_inventory' in cpp or 'displayInventory' in cpp, 'Create a function to show inventory (e.g., showInventory)'
assert 'saveGame' in cpp or 'save_game' in cpp or 'saveToFile' in cpp, 'Create a function to save the game (e.g., saveGame)'
acceptance_criteria: At least 4 functions defined with proper return types and parameters
displayRoom function prints room name and description
playerAttack function calculates and returns damage
showInventory function displays the player's items
saveGame function writes stats to a file
hints: void displayRoom(string name, string desc) { cout << "=== " << name << " ===" << endl; cout << desc << endl; }
int playerAttack(int attackPower) { int damage = attackPower + (rand() % 5); return damage; }
void showInventory(string items[], int count) { for (int i = 0; i < count; i++) cout << i+1 << ". " << items[i] << endl; }
Pass arrays to functions as: void func(string arr[], int size)
Add #include <cstdlib> if you want to use rand() for random damage
